input.title: ClickHouse Release 26.4
input.content: New JSON data type GA, faster S3 reads, 40 bug fixes. Upgrade notes inside.

input.title: Partial Prerendering is now stable
input.content: PPR graduates to stable in 15.5. How to adopt, config flags, and migration steps.

input.title: Fixed incorrect tax rounding on multi-currency invoices
input.content: Invoices with mixed currencies could round tax to the wrong minor unit. Resolved for all accounts.

input.title: Security advisory: WAF bypass via crafted header
input.content: We patched a bypass affecting custom rules. No customer action required; details and timeline below.

input.title: Foreign data wrappers: query Stripe from Postgres
input.content: New FDW ships today. Create a wrapper, map columns, and query external APIs as tables.

input.title: ClickHouse at FOSDEM: announcing ClickPipes GA
input.content: At our FOSDEM booth we launched ClickPipes GA — managed ingestion from Kafka with exactly-once delivery, available now.

input.title: How Globex cut infra costs 60% with Acme
input.content: Globex migrated 200 services to Acme and reduced spend dramatically. Read their story.
